name: Harry Reser
abstract: Harrison Franklin Reser (January 17, 1896 – September 27, 1965) was an American banjo player and bandleader. Born in Piqua, Ohio, Reser was best known as the leader of The Clicquot Club Eskimos.

about_quotes.speaker: Billy Bauer
about_quotes.evidence: Harry Reser, he was a popular band leader, Cliquot Eskimos I think they were called. Harry Reser, he played like a violin player would play, you know, those banjo solos.
about_quotes.doc_title: Billy Bauer interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, March 22, 1998
